_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Universe-level view: 10 entities total, 3 scored. Color zones: Red/Critical Risk (2 entities), Yellow/Moderate Risk (1 entity). 7 entities unscored. Color names and classification labels are client-configured — not hardcoded.

_drillDownExamples.universe: This payload (all entities in audit universe)
_drillDownExamples.entity: If user clicks 'Operations Audit Unit' → viewContext.currentLevel becomes 'entity', itemType becomes 'layer', contextPath becomes 'Operations Audit Unit', colorDistribution shows layers of Operations Audit Unit
_drillDownExamples.layer: If user clicks 'Financial Controls' → itemType becomes 'process', contextPath becomes 'Operations Audit Unit > Financial Controls'
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Expense Management' → itemType becomes 'risk', contextPath becomes 'Operations Audit Unit > Financial Controls > Expense Management'

colorDistribution.description: 3 scored entities: 2 Red (Critical Risk), 1 Yellow (Moderate Risk). 7 entities unscored.

priorityItems.description: Top entities by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
